claimText: LMU IfKW guidance treats verbatim or minimally changed AI-generated text without proper attribution as plagiarism, and says significant unattributed AI-generated text in assessed work can receive grade 5 (failed).
normalizedValue: Unattributed AI-generated text is treated as plagiarism in the IfKW guidance

citation.citationTitle: The use of AI by students
